description_long: This is a small, cylindrical cup with a smooth, continuous surface and a single rounded handle attached to one side. The cup is uniformly colored in a matte reddish-orange hue, giving it a modern and minimalistic appearance. The handle is proportionally sized for easy gripping and is seamlessly integrated into the body of the cup. The rim is even and slightly thickened, suggesting durability and comfort for drinking. The interior appears hollow, suitable for holding liquids, and the base is flat, ensuring stability when placed on surfaces. There are no visible logos, patterns, or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian design.
description: A matte reddish-orange cylindrical cup with a rounded handle and a smooth, minimalistic finish.
description_view_0: The cup is seen from the front, showing the open top and a partial view of the handle on the right side.
description_view_1: The cup is viewed from the side, clearly displaying the full rounded handle attached to the body.
description_view_2: The cup is seen from the back, with the handle barely visible and the cylindrical body prominent.
description_view_3: The cup is viewed from the opposite side, again showing the handle in full profile.
